title: How We Can Work Together
thirdOption: Not sure what you need? Let’s figure it out

plans.name: One project, start to finish
plans.description: A new website, a rebrand, or a landing page. Scoped, quoted, and delivered.
features: Fixed scope and price, agreed up front
Clear timeline with review points along the way
You own everything at the end
A good fit if you know roughly what you need

plans.name: Ongoing design + development
plans.description: A monthly arrangement for businesses that need regular design and dev work without hiring in-house.
features: Set monthly retainer, no lock-in contracts
Updates, new pages, and improvements without quoting each one separately
I build up knowledge of your business, so turnaround gets faster over time
A good fit if your website is never really finished

plans.name: Agency + studio support
plans.description: White-label design and front-end development for creative and digital agencies.
features: Experienced as an embedded external team member
Figma-to-code, full-stack handoff, or overflow capacity
Comfortable in your workflow, your tools, and your client deadlines
A good fit if you need reliable hands without growing headcount
